description.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的编织图案，由交替的垂直和水平圆角条（柔和的高斯状边缘）组成，排列在2x2重复单元格中。
description.en: Generates a tileable weave pattern composed of alternating vertical and horizontal rounded bars (soft, Gaussian-like edges) arranged in a 2x2 repeating cell.

triggers.zh-Hans: 编织, 编织图案, 交错, 编条, 编织纹理, 篮纹
triggers.en: weave, woven, basket weave, interlaced, wicker

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的编织条纹理，用于篮子、家具或装饰性表面。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a tileable woven strip texture for baskets, furniture, or decorative surfaces.
